positive: A retro 80s synthwave illustration of a stylized palm tree silhouette against a vibrant neon grid background. The color palette must be dominated by electric magenta, cyan, and deep purple. The style should be highly saturated, vaporwave aesthetic, incorporating Japanese Kanji elements and a sense of infinite horizon.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, realistic, natural light, watercolor, soft edges
